calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jan-30-2026 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-29-2026 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Plaintiff is present, represented by Hiba Hamadi.
Attorney Julia Adams for the plaintiff.
Defendant Petra Callahan is present.
Attorney Gracen Evall appearing for defendant in limited scope.

Judge Pro Tem is not available. Judge Samuel K. Feng assisting with settlement discussions. This case settles. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed. The trial date of Feb-02-2026 is vacated. (D501)
